name: UNITED NATURAL FOODS INC
summary: In this Annual Report on Form10-K (Annual Report or Report), unless otherwise specified, references to United Natural Foods, UNFI, we, us, our or the Company mean United Natural Foods,Inc. together with its consolidated subsidiaries. We are a Delaware corporation based in Providence, Rhode Island. We conduct our business through various subsidiaries.
